message:
feat(benchmark): realistic ML workloads with DuckDB comparison

Updated bench_logic_table.zig with production-scale ML operations:

Feature Engineering (10M rows):
- normalize_minmax: 125.9M rows/sec
- normalize_zscore: 86.6M rows/sec
- log_transform: 55.2M rows/sec
- clip_outliers: 114.4M rows/sec
- vs DuckDB z-score: 939ms (8x slower)

Vector Search (100K docs, 384-dim):
- cosine_similarity: 5.2M docs/sec (19ms)
- euclidean_distance: 5.8M docs/sec (17ms)

Fraud Detection (5M transactions):
- Multi-factor risk scoring: 75.8M txns/sec (66ms)
- vs DuckDB SQL: 1039ms (16x slower)

Recommendations (50K items, 128-dim):
- Collaborative filtering: 48.6M items/sec (1ms)

All functions use SIMD vectorization matching metal0 output.
